productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men New Pampa Black Formal Shoe
description: This buckaroo men New Pampa Black Casual shoe draws from its signature sturdiness and quality hide to produce this layered shoe. True to its origins from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. Wear it with formal trousers, full-sleeved shirts and tonal belts. Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Stitch detailing for added structure and style Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand logo printed on lateral side Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Slip-resistant TPR outsole for enhanced grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
